'''Nils Davani''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He was the husband of [[Haryette Davani|Haryette]] and the father of [[Myrette Davani|Myrette]]. Living on [[Beheboth]], he appeared to be a former military [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].
